title: derwentia nivea
intro: Derwentia nivea, also known as snow grass or alpine snow grass, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Derwentia nivea include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory health, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Derwentia nivea typically involve infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to soothe coughs, colds, and other respiratory issues.
